title: pelargonium × schottii
intro: Pelargonium × schottii, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the geranium family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and supporting the immune system. Rose Geranium can be consumed in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or in aromatherapy to harness its therapeutic benefits.
